recommendations.title: True Confessions
recommendations.overview: A cop clashes with his priest brother while investigating the brutal murder of a young prostitute.

recommendations.title: The Deep End of the Ocean
recommendations.overview: A three-year-old boy disappears during his mother's high school reunion. Nine years later, by chance, he turns up in the town in which the family has just relocated.

recommendations.title: Falling in Love

recommendations.title: Trailer Park Boys: Countdown to Liquor Day
recommendations.overview: Ricky, Julian and Bubbles are about to get out of jail, and this time, Julian vows to go straight, even open a legit business. Soon the Boys will all be rich. At least that's what they've told the parole board. But when they arrive back at the park,

recommendations.title: Ocean's Eleven
recommendations.overview: Less than 24 hours into his parole, charismatic thief Danny Ocean is already rolling out his next plan: In one night, Danny's hand-picked crew of specialists will attempt to steal more than $150 million from three Las Vegas casinos. But to score the

recommendations.title: Donnie Brasco
recommendations.overview: An FBI undercover agent infiltrates the mob and identifies more with the mafia life at the expense of his regular one.

recommendations.title: The Woodsman

recommendations.title: The Unforgivable
recommendations.overview: A woman is released from prison after serving a sentence for a violent crime and re-enters a society that refuses to forgive her past.

recommendations.title: The Killing

recommendations.title: Kaithi
recommendations.overview: Dilli, a convicted criminal, is out on parole to meet his daughter. However, a drug bust sets him off on a mission to save the life of police officers.
